codeReview.summary: The implementation fully covers all expected behavior from the feature description. Consistent JSON output format is implemented with proper envelope structures, global flags (--json, --verbose, --config, --profile, --no-color) work correctly, and error codes follow UPPER_SNAKE_CASE convention. The retryable field is now always included in error envelopes per VAL-CLI-035.

summary: PASS - Feature preset-cli-output-format is fully implemented. All 6 validation assertions (VAL-CLI-035 to VAL-CLI-040) are satisfied. The implementation adds global flags support, ensures retryable field is always present in error envelopes, and provides comprehensive test coverage for output format validation.
